name: Adele Stratton
background: Adele Stratton was appointed Chief Financial Officer and Head of Development in September 2018. She joined Iluka in 2011 and has held various senior roles in finance and corporate development. She is a qualified Chartered Accountant and holds a Bachelor of Commerce from the University of Western Australia.

commpanies.name: Iluka Resources Limited
commpanies.title_or_role: Chief Financial Officer and Head of Development
